===Pokémon Generations===
[[File:Elesa PG.png|thumb|250px|Elesa in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
Elesa appeared in ''[[PG13|The Uprising]]'', where she was seen outside [[N's Castle]] trying to stop the [[Seven Sages]]. Together with several other [[Unova]] [[Gym Leader]]s, she battled the many {{tc|Team Plasma Grunt}}s to prevent them from achieving [[Team Plasma]]'s goals.
